eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Douglas; Storey; Lyon; Carson City, NV; at 8:59 AM on SEP 25, 2019 Effective until 9:14 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Lyon County authorities have issued a REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for Douglas, Carson City, Lyon, Storey and Alpine Counties.  This is only a test. No action required
